prophet.narrative: [prophet] DEGRADATION (Δ%=-9.01%, DM p=0.0000). Adding Global lagged regressor significantly worsens forecast. Sentinel framing operational refinement: Global signal is monitoring leading indicator (DTW shape similarity) but NOT predictive feature -- active interference in forecast model. Stage 8 dashboard implication: right-panel reference visualization, NOT model input. 4th outcome scenario (matrix extension).

cross_model.narrative: BOTH MODELS DEGRADATION (4th outcome scenario, sentinel operational refinement). Global signal is monitoring leading indicator (DTW shape similarity, sign-corrected) but actively interferes with both Prophet changepoint absorption AND SARIMAX explicit regression. Direction-asymmetric quantitative validation of DP24: Korea->Global degradation 41-59% (DP23-contaminated) vs Global->Korea degradation 9-11% (leakage-free) -- magnitude reduction 1/4~1/5 confirms sign correction validity (3rd quantitative signature, joining mediation signature dissipation and CI narrowing).
